title: Hoist Leg Press Machine
short_description: The Hoist leg press machine, often featuring patented ROC-IT (ROX) technology.
full_description: The Hoist leg press machine, often featuring patented ROC-IT (ROX) technology, is a specialized, space-efficient strength trainer designed to improve lower-body workouts by rocking the user backward during the movement. This motion enhances muscle engagement (quads, glutes) while reducing lower back and knee.
